allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "Killing PID $\($p.Id\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force } })
